# n-dx

> Codebase analysis generated by Sourcevision.
> When using this document: group related items together and separate unrelated concerns.

## Project Overview

- **Files**: 583
- **Lines of code**: 170,461
- **Languages**: TypeScript (475), CSS (27), JSON (26), Other (20), JavaScript (17)
- **Zones**: 7 (7 with descriptions)
- **Git**: feature/from-recommend @ 2460aa6
- **Analyzed**: 2026-02-12T01:00:16.296Z

## Architecture Zones

### Autonomous Agent Engine (`autonomous-agent-engine`)

Task execution engine that autonomously picks PRD tasks, builds execution briefs, and manages Claude API tool-use loops.

- Files: 99
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/autonomous-agent-engine/context.md`

### Foundation Layer (`foundation-layer`)

Shared Claude API abstraction and utility foundation that serves as the dependency inversion root for all domain packages.

- Files: 24
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/foundation-layer/context.md`

### Integrated Web Dashboard (`integrated-web-dashboard`)

Unified coordination facade that hosts dashboard UI, MCP HTTP endpoints, and provides filesystem-first access to all domain package data.

- Files: 144
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/integrated-web-dashboard/context.md`

### Orchestration Layer (`orchestration-layer`)

Command delegation and multi-package coordination scripts that spawn CLIs without direct library imports.

- Files: 4
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/orchestration-layer/context.md`

### Rex PRD Management CLI (`packages-rex:rex-cli`)

A self-contained CLI tool and MCP server for managing hierarchical product requirements documents, including code analysis, tree operations, validation, persistence, and AI-agent workflow integration.

- Files: 36
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-rex:rex-cli/context.md`

### Cli (`packages-sourcevision:cli`)

12 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 12
- Cohesion: 0.74, Coupling: 0.26
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/constants.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/init.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/errors.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/output.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:cli/context.md`

### Tests (`packages-sourcevision:tests`)

66 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 68
- Cohesion: 0.94, Coupling: 0.06
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/analyze.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/mcp.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/export/pdf-report.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/data-files.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/index.ts (+1 more)
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:tests/context.md`

## Route Structure

### Server API Routes

**/api/hench/adaptive/** (handleAdaptiveRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-adaptive.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/hench/adaptive/override/:key
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/analysis
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/history
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/apply
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/dismiss/:id
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/lock/:key
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/override
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/unlock/:key
```

**/api/hench/** (handleHenchRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-hench.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/hench/templates/:id
GET     /api/hench/config
GET     /api/hench/runs
GET     /api/hench/runs/:id
GET     /api/hench/templates
GET     /api/hench/templates/:id
GET     /limit
POST    /api/hench/templates
POST    /api/hench/templates/:id/apply
PUT     /api/hench/config
```

**/api/rex/** (handleRexRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-rex.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/rex/items/:id/requirements/:rid
GET     /api/rex/dashboard
GET     /api/rex/execute/status
GET     /api/rex/items/:id
GET     /api/rex/items/:id/requirements
GET     /api/rex/log
GET     /api/rex/next
GET     /api/rex/prd
GET     /api/rex/proposals
GET     /api/rex/prune/preview
GET     /api/rex/requirements/coverage
GET     /api/rex/requirements/traceability
GET     /api/rex/stats
GET     /limit
GET     /minAge
GET     /statuses
PATCH   /api/rex/items/:id
PATCH   /api/rex/items/:id/requirements/:rid
PATCH   /api/rex/items/bulk
POST    /api/rex/analyze
POST    /api/rex/batch
POST    /api/rex/execute/epic
POST    /api/rex/execute/pause
POST    /api/rex/execute/resume
POST    /api/rex/items
POST    /api/rex/items/:id/requirements
POST    /api/rex/items/merge
POST    /api/rex/proposals/accept
POST    /api/rex/prune
POST    /api/rex/smart
```

**/api/sv/** (handleSourcevisionRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-sourcevision.ts`

```
GET     /api/sv/components
GET     /api/sv/context
GET     /api/sv/imports
GET     /api/sv/inventory
GET     /api/sv/manifest
GET     /api/sv/summary
GET     /api/sv/zones
```

**/api/token/** (handleTokenUsageRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-token-usage.ts`

```
GET     /api/token/budget
GET     /api/token/by
GET     /api/token/events
GET     /api/token/summary
GET     /package
GET     /period
GET     /since
GET     /until
```

**/api/rex/validate** (handleValidationRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-validation.ts`

```
GET     /api/rex/dependency
GET     /api/rex/validate
```

**/api/hench/workflow/** (handleWorkflowRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-workflow.ts`

```
GET     /api/hench/workflow/analysis
GET     /api/hench/workflow/history
POST    /api/hench/workflow/apply
POST    /api/hench/workflow/suggestions/:id
```

### Components: 5 total, 0 usage edges

## Findings

### Anti-patterns

- Sourcevision package artificially split into CLI and tests zones when it should be unified as a single domain package with proper internal layering [warning]
- Web package test file directly imports rex schema types, creating tight coupling between coordination layer and domain implementation details [warning]
- God function: analyzeComponents in packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/components.ts calls 53 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]
- God function: CallGraphView in packages/web/src/viewer/views/call-graph.ts calls 51 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]

### Patterns

- Architectural layering with subprocess boundaries and gateway patterns achieves perfect dependency isolation [info]
- Gateway pattern standardization across packages creates consistent, auditable cross-package interface boundaries [info]

### Relationships

- Dual coordination strategies (runtime gateway vs filesystem-first) demonstrate architectural flexibility within strict dependency rules [info]
- Tightly coupled modules: packages/web/src/server/routes-rex.ts and packages/web/src/server/types.ts — 129 cross-file calls (unidirectional). Consider extracting shared interface or merging [info]

### Observations

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (autonomous-agent-engine)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (foundation-layer)
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 144 files vs smallest with 4 — uneven decomposition [info]
- Four-tier hierarchy (orchestration → coordination → execution → domain → foundation) provides clean separation of concerns [info]
- Missing rex and sourcevision zones suggests they may be integrated into other detected zones or require separate analysis [info]
- Perfect zone isolation (all zones have 1.0 cohesion, 0.0 coupling) indicates exceptional architectural discipline [info]
- Fan-in hotspot: packages/rex/src/store/index.ts receives calls from 22 files — high-impact module, changes may have wide ripple effects [warning]
- Contains 45% of project files (144/322) — subdivided into 3 sub-zones [info] (integrated-web-dashboard)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (integrated-web-dashboard)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (orchestration-layer)

### Suggestions

- New analytics.ts module in rex/core may indicate evolving analytics responsibilities that should be clearly scoped vs web dashboard analytics [info] (autonomous-agent-engine)
- Analytics logic duplication between orchestration (ci.js computeStats) and domain (rex/core/analytics.ts) should be consolidated to prevent inconsistent calculations [warning]
- Untracked files in git status suggest ongoing development that may require zone boundary updates once features stabilize [info]
- Hub function: resolveStore in packages/rex/src/store/index.ts is called from 17 files — changes here have wide impact, consider if responsibilities can be narrowed [warning]
- Potentially unused export: getData in packages/web/src/viewer/loader.ts has no incoming calls — verify if still needed [info]
- Hard-coded trimOutput and formatting logic in ci.js should delegate to domain packages for consistent output formatting [info] (orchestration-layer)
- ci.js duplicates computeStats function that already exists in rex/core/stats.js, violating DRY principle and creating maintenance burden [warning] (orchestration-layer)
